_file_info.Brief: Ubuntu 自包含部署插件配置
_file_info.Function: 定义 MGSC DAW FastAPI 服务在容器内使用的 Kong Audio 和 SoundFont 插件风格配置
_file_info.Author: 咪咕数创工程架构组 / MGSC AI Software Architecture group

plugins.name: Qin_RV
plugins.notes: Self-contained deployment profile for Linux Carla plus official win32 Wine bridge. Use Qin_RV.DLL directly; Qin_RV_x64.DLL was silent under Wine in this environment.

plugins.name: Musyng Kite
plugins.label: Musyng_Kite
plugins.notes: General MIDI SoundFont profile rendered by Carla FluidSynth. Preserve MIDI channels and program changes.

plugins.name: FluidR3 GM
plugins.label: FluidR3_GM
plugins.notes: Candidate GM SoundFont mentioned in 云端DAW音频工作站引擎.docx. Explicit style only; not used by the current 137-row auto mapping until product confirms it should replace Musyng Kite for any programs.

plugins.name: Keyzone Classic
plugins.notes: x64 VST2 piano plugin. Requires carla-bridge-win64.exe and plugin directory materialized under Wine C:\VSTPlugins.

plugins.name: DSK Saxophones
plugins.notes: x64 VST2 saxophone plugin. Requires carla-bridge-win64.exe and plugin directory materialized under Wine C:\VSTPlugins.

plugins.name: Sonatina Orchestra
plugins.notes: x64 VST2 orchestra plugin. Requires carla-bridge-win64.exe and plugin directory materialized under Wine C:\VSTPlugins.

plugins.name: A320U GM
plugins.label: A320U
plugins.notes: Local SF2 candidate asset exposed as explicit style; not used by current 137-row auto mapping.

plugins.name: A320U Drums
plugins.label: A320U_drums
plugins.notes: Local SF2 candidate asset exposed as explicit style; not used by current 137-row auto mapping.

plugins.notes: Local Steinberg/VSTPlugins candidate exposed for explicit style rendering; not used by current 137-row auto mapping until validated.

styles.name: Kong YangQin 02 Sus mp
styles.notes: Verified with GUI-authored Qin_RV state; requires ChineeYangQin library under Kong Audio Library.

styles.name: Kong GuZheng Classic 03 Sus Shake 2
styles.notes: Verified with GUI-authored Qin_RV state; requires ChineeGuZheng_Classic library under Kong Audio Library.

midi_policy.notes: SoundFont GM rendering should preserve original MIDI channels, bank select, and program changes.

styles.name: FluidR3 GM

midi_policy.notes: SoundFont GM rendering should preserve original MIDI channels, bank select, and program changes.

styles.notes: Candidate explicit style for需求文档音源选型中的 FluidR3 GM；当前不参与 style_id=auto 的 137 条映射。

styles.name: Keyzone Steinway Piano
styles.instrument: 原声大钢琴 Acoustic Grand Piano
styles.notes: 文档 cloud bank 为 ？，运行配置中需要表达为插件预设而不是 SF2 Bank
